stocks.impact_theory: NVIDIA announced accelerated delivery of Blackwell AI chips amid surging demand from hyperscalers. Economically, this boosts AI infrastructure spend, enhancing NVDA's moat. Market psychology: FOMO buying as AI narrative strengthens. Historical parallel: 2023 Hopper ramp-up led to 200% gain. Analogies: Like Intel in PC boom or Cisco in dotcom era.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Web searches show positive analyst upgrades (e.g., MSFT, Goldman); X sentiment 85% bullish (semantic search: 'NVDA Blackwell' high engagement, min_faves 100+ posts praising supply chain fix).

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Buy for 10-15% upside in week; target $160.
potential_profit_risks.short_position: Avoid or cover shorts; potential squeeze.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Chip delay rumors, US-China trade tensions, overvaluation if AI hype cools.

stocks.justification: Strong news corroboration across sources, high X volume, historical precedent.

stocks.impact_theory: Tesla unveiled Cybercab robotaxi prototype with unsupervised FSD claims. Implications: Accelerates autonomy revenue, disrupts ride-sharing. Psychology: Retail euphoria on X. Parallels: 2020 S&P inclusion rally. Analogies: iPhone launch for mobility or Uber IPO hype.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: News from Reuters/CNBC on event; X keyword search 'TSLA Cybercab' shows 90% positive, viral threads with 50k likes.

potential_profit_risks.short_position: High risk short, volatility spike expected.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Regulatory hurdles for autonomy, production delays, Elon Musk tweet volatility.

stocks.justification: Event-driven catalyst with massive social buzz.

stocks.impact_theory: AMD reported MI300X AI GPU outselling expectations, stealing NVDA share. Economic: Intense competition lowers AI costs. Psychology: Value play vs NVDA. Parallels: 2017 Epyc CPU gains. Analogies: Pepsi challenging Coke or Android vs iOS.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Earnings leak via web_search; X semantic search bullish on 'AMD AI chips' vs NVDA.

stocks.justification: Solid but secondary to NVDA news.

stocks.impact_theory: Meta launched Orion AI glasses, expanding wearables. Implications: New ad revenue from AR. Psychology: Innovation rebound. Parallels: Quest VR pivot. Analogies: Apple Watch extension or Google Glass 2.0.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Product demo coverage; X posts positive on demos.

stocks.impact_theory: Palantir won $1B DoD contract for AI platforms. Implications: Validates gov revenue. Psychology: Meme stock revival. Parallels: 2021 SPAC hype. Analogies: Snowflake IPO or Snowflake data wars.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Gov contract news; X hype with retail frenzy.
